summary: MPH programs contribute to health system strengthening in LMICs by improving structured management of maternal-fetal complications through systematic identification, monitoring, intervention planning, and coordinated care—enhancing clinical outcomes via standardization, protocol adherence, and real-time data use within resource-constrained environments.
